LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_None: Luxandra is enjoying watching whatever comes by. Everything is good to our goddess, as long as it's sex.
LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_Pregnancy: Luxandra loves watching raw vaginal sex, as well as seeing already pregnant women still embark in lewd activities despite the new life they carry in them.
LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_Anal: Luxandra is enjoying watching sexy backdoor access. Fearless raw anal penetration and fisting truly reward those who can stand the heat.
LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_Oral: Luxandra wants to see some good head action. Masterful tongue strokes, gentle sucking, and warm fluid exchanges, she craves it all.
LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_Bestiality: Luxandra thinks that nature has a lot to offer. Huge cocks beyond human sizes, soft pussies with unfamiliar textures, and exciting knot action to be bound by.
LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_Rape: Luxandra is bored of consensuality. She wants to see people taken by force. She loves when the other person cannot say no...
LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_Masturbation: Luxandra often enjoys some alone time, and wants to see people do the same. After all, you know how to please yourself better than anyone else.
LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_Necrophilia: Luxandra loves when something is stiff. Or moist. Why use sex toys when corpses always provide a new, unexpected sensation?
LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_Gay: Luxandra loves manliness, but loves even more when two hot men join in a sensual union of bodies. The muscles, the sweat, the cum, that is what she lives for.
LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_Lesbian: Luxandra craves seeing other women together. Without the limits of male genitals, women can embrace into virtually infinite exchanges, with their soft breasts pressed against each other in a marvelous view.
LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_Cum: Luxandra craves the warm, sticky product of male pleasure. Anything that involves making a man cum will be pure ecstasy for her.
LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_Breasts: Luxandra enjoys looking the curves of other women. Small, big or gargantuan, all are proud symbols of fertility, and strong instruments of seduction.
LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_Incest: Luxandra loves the forbidden. She wants to see people who are not supposed to be together, together. The more taboo, the better.
LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_Implantation: Luxandra has seen parasitic insectoids use humans as seed bed and found it arousing. She wants to see more of them, witness eggs implanted into people and watch those unsettling births come toghether.
LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_Futa: Luxandra loves the best of both worlds. She enjoys seeing women with massive dicks, and men with enormous breasts hiding their vagina behind their throbbing cocks. The combination of both worlds is a true delight for her.
LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_Mechanophilia: Luxandra thinks you should fist the androids, as long as you are careful with the gears. After all, the metallic texture of our robotic friends are a unique experience on your skin... or inside you...
LanguageData.Luxandra_KinkFlavor_Tentacles: Luxandra loves the sight of alien appendages slowly crawling around human bodies, exploring all their cavities and ravaging them with otherworldy strenght.
